text: The child is a well-known category in today’s society in the field of law and crime, with law being the social expression of the societal concepts towards children at the normative and organizational level. Protecting children within the legal (justice) system – especially within the repressive part of justice system which pertains to criminal and misdemeanor law – grounds the concept of the child in conflict with law ( ювенильное уголовное право). Consequently, this paper will give an overview of normative rules and standards relating to the position of children within criminal and misdemeanor law on the supranational (by presenting standards and their impact on amendments) and national level (by analyzing the position of a state as well as needs of Croatian society). It shall particularly focus on the position of a child in a capacity of a victim of a criminal offense.
